assets.description: Mining ship hull decal with charcoal panels, teal cockpit signal, and luminous panel lines.
assets.intended_use: Three.js ship hull decal overlay and visible player-ship treatment.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation on a chroma-key source, locally converted to alpha, cropped, and resized to 256x256 PNG.

assets.description: Charcoal asteroid rock material with teal survey seams and amber ore glints.
assets.intended_use: Asteroid surface material and emissive ore-glow texture in the 3D scene.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation and resized/cropped to exact square texture dimensions.

assets.description: Docking panel texture with clamp geometry, bay framing, and teal signal strips.
assets.intended_use: Frontier Spoke station core and docking bay texture.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation in a 2:1 composition and resized to exact dimensions.

assets.description: Angular hostile marker silhouette with red danger wake and sharp pirate-raider identity.
assets.intended_use: Transparent hostile marker sprite carried by the pirate mesh.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation on a chroma-key source, locally converted to alpha, cropped, and resized to 256x256 PNG.

assets.description: Title-card art showing the mining ship extracting ore from asteroids near Frontier Spoke with a distant hostile marker.
assets.intended_use: Game title band and arcade thumbnail art.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation and resized/cropped to exact 16:9 dimensions.

notes: Original Void Prospector asset pack generated through the visual-asset-pipeline Codex bridge; final project-consumed PNGs are local under games/void-prospector/assets.
